DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT]
( 
	[SalesDistrictID] [nvarchar](50)  NOT NULL,
	[ShortName] [nvarchar](15)  NULL,
	[MediumName] [nvarchar](30)  NULL,
	[LongName] [nvarchar](50)  NULL,
	[LP_SalesDistrictID] [nvarchar](5)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](10)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [DATETIME]  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE
)
GO
